mapper.select:
SELECT shelf_id AS shelfId, COALESCE(SUM(stock), 0) AS usedStock FROM lib_stock
shelf_id IN
#{shelfId}
1 = 0
GROUP BY shelf_id

SELECT s.shelf_id AS shelfId, b.isbn, b.cover AS coverUrl, b.name FROM lib_stock AS s INNER JOIN lib_book AS b ON b.isbn = s.isbn
s.shelf_id IN
#{shelfId}
1 = 0
ORDER BY b.name ASC, b.isbn ASC

SELECT sh.id AS id, sh.id AS value, CONCAT(f.name, ' / ', sh.shelf_no, IF(sh.name IS NULL OR sh.name = '', '', CONCAT(' ', sh.name))) AS label, sh.shelf_no AS shelfNo, sh.name, sh.floor_id AS floorId, f.name AS floorName, sh.capacity, COALESCE(SUM(s.stock), 0) AS usedStock, GREATEST(sh.capacity - COALESCE(SUM(s.stock), 0), 0) AS remainingCapacity, sh.status FROM lib_bookshelf AS sh INNER JOIN lib_floor AS f ON f.id = sh.floor_id LEFT JOIN lib_stock AS s ON s.shelf_id = sh.id
sh.status = 1 AND f.status = 1
GROUP BY sh.id, sh.shelf_no, sh.name, sh.floor_id, f.name, f.floor_no, f.sort, sh.capacity, sh.status ORDER BY f.sort ASC, f.floor_no ASC, sh.shelf_no ASC
